statistics/f:alerts_g: Number of alerts processed for band g
statistics/f:alerts_i: Number of alerts processed for band i
statistics/f:alerts_r: Number of alerts processed for band r
statistics/f:alerts_u: Number of alerts processed for band u
statistics/f:alerts_y: Number of alerts processed for band y
statistics/f:alerts_z: Number of alerts processed for band z
statistics/f:fink_broker_version: fink-broker version used to process the alert data
statistics/f:fink_science_version: fink-science version used to process the alert data
statistics/f:glint_trail: Number of alerts with the flag glint_trail
statistics/f:in_tns: Number of alerts with a counterpart in TNS
statistics/f:isDipole: Number of alerts with the flag isDipole
statistics/f:is_cataloged: Number of alerts with a counterpart in SIMBAD or Gaia DR3.
statistics/f:is_first: Number of alerts with first detection
statistics/f:is_sso: Number of alerts associated to a Solar System objects
statistics/f:lsst_schema_version: LSST schema version used to generate alert data
statistics/f:night: Observation date in the form YYYYMMDD
statistics/f:objects: Number of unique objects for the night
statistics/f:pixelFlags_cr: Number of alerts with the flag pixelFlags_cr
statistics/f:pixelFlags_saturated: Number of alerts with the flag pixelFlags_saturated
statistics/f:pixelFlags_streak: Number of alerts with the flag pixelFlags_streak
tags/r:apFlux: Flux in a 12 pixel radius aperture on the difference image [nJy].
tags/r:apFlux_flag: General aperture flux algorithm failure flag; set if anything went wrong when measuring aperture fluxes. Another apFlux flag field should also be set to provide more information.
tags/r:apFlux_flag_apertureTruncated: Aperture did not fit within measurement image.
tags/r:band: Filter band this source was observed with.
tags/r:bboxSize: Size of the square bounding box that fully contains the detection footprint [pixel].
tags/r:centroid_flag: General centroid algorithm failure flag; set if anything went wrong when fitting the centroid. Another centroid flag field should also be set to provide more information.
tags/r:dec: Declination coordinate of the center of this diaSource [deg].
tags/r:detector: Id of the detector where this diaSource was measured. Datatype short instead of byte because of DB concerns about unsigned bytes.
tags/r:diaObjectId: Id of the diaObject this source was associated with, if any. If not, it is set to NULL (each diaSource will be associated with either a diaObject or ssObject).
tags/r:dipoleAngle: Maximum likelihood fit of the angle between the meridian through the centroid and the dipole direction (bearing, from negative to positive lobe) [deg].
tags/r:dipoleChi2: Chi^2 statistic of the model fit.
tags/r:dipoleFitAttempted: Attempted to fit a dipole model to this source.
tags/r:dipoleFluxDiff: Maximum likelihood value for the difference of absolute fluxes of the two lobes for a dipole model [nJy].
tags/r:dipoleLength: Maximum likelihood value for the lobe separation in dipole model [arcsec].
tags/r:dipoleMeanFlux: Maximum likelihood value for the mean absolute flux of the two lobes for a dipole model [nJy].
tags/r:dipoleNdata: The number of data points (pixels) used to fit the model.
tags/r:extendedness: A measure of extendedness, computed by comparing an object's moment-based traced radius to the PSF moments. extendedness = 1 implies a high degree of confidence that the source is extended. extendedness = 0 implies a high degree of confidence that the source is point-like.
tags/r:forced_PsfFlux_flag: Forced PSF photometry on science image failed. Another forced_PsfFlux flag field should also be set to provide more information.
tags/r:forced_PsfFlux_flag_edge: Forced PSF flux on science image was too close to the edge of the image to use the full PSF model.
tags/r:forced_PsfFlux_flag_noGoodPixels: Forced PSF flux not enough non-rejected pixels in data to attempt the fit.
tags/r:glint_trail: This flag is set if the source is part of a glint trail.
tags/r:isDipole: Source well fit by a dipole.
tags/r:isNegative: Source was detected as significantly negative.
tags/r:ixx: Adaptive second moment of the source intensity [nJy.arcsec**2].
tags/r:ixxPSF: Adaptive second moment for the PSF [nJy.arcsec**2].
tags/r:ixy: Adaptive second moment of the source intensity [nJy.arcsec**2].
tags/r:ixyPSF: Adaptive second moment for the PSF [nJy.arcsec**2].
tags/r:iyy: Adaptive second moment of the source intensity [nJy.arcsec**2].
tags/r:iyyPSF: Adaptive second moment for the PSF [nJy.arcsec**2].
tags/r:midpointMjdTai: Effective mid-visit time for this diaSource, expressed as Modified Julian Date, International Atomic Time [d].
tags/r:observation_reason: Scheduler reason for the image containing this diaSource (RTN-097).
tags/r:parentDiaSourceId: Id of the parent diaSource this diaSource has been deblended from, if any.
tags/r:pixelFlags: General pixel flags failure; set if anything went wrong when setting pixels flags from this footprint's mask. This implies that some pixelFlags for this source may be incorrectly set to False.
tags/r:pixelFlags_bad: Bad pixel in the DiaSource footprint.
tags/r:pixelFlags_cr: Cosmic ray in the DiaSource footprint.
tags/r:pixelFlags_crCenter: Cosmic ray in the 3x3 region around the centroid.
tags/r:pixelFlags_edge: Some of the source footprint is outside usable exposure region (masked EDGE or centroid off image).
tags/r:pixelFlags_injectedCenter: Injection in the 3x3 region around the centroid.
tags/r:pixelFlags_injected_template: Template injection in the DiaSource footprint.
tags/r:pixelFlags_injected_templateCente: Template injection in the 3x3 region around the centroid.
tags/r:pixelFlags_interpolated: Interpolated pixel in the DiaSource footprint.
tags/r:pixelFlags_interpolatedCenter: Interpolated pixel in the 3x3 region around the centroid.
tags/r:pixelFlags_nodata: NO_DATA pixel in the source footprint.
tags/r:pixelFlags_nodataCenter: NO_DATA pixel in the 3x3 region around the centroid.
tags/r:pixelFlags_saturated: Saturated pixel in the DiaSource footprint.
tags/r:pixelFlags_saturatedCenter: Saturated pixel in the 3x3 region around the centroid.
tags/r:pixelFlags_streakCenter: Streak in the 3x3 region around the centroid.
tags/r:pixelFlags_suspectCenter: Suspect pixel in the 3x3 region around the centroid.
tags/r:psfChi2: Chi^2 statistic of the point source model fit.
tags/r:psfFlux: Flux for Point Source model. Note this actually measures the flux difference between the template and the visit image [nJy].
tags/r:psfFlux_flag: Failure to derive linear least-squares fit of psf model. Another psfFlux flag field should also be set to provide more information.
tags/r:psfFlux_flag_edge: Object was too close to the edge of the image to use the full PSF model.
tags/r:psfFlux_flag_noGoodPixels: Not enough non-rejected pixels in data to attempt the fit.
tags/r:psfLnL: Natural log likelihood of the observed data given the point source model.
tags/r:psfNdata: The number of data points (pixels) used to fit the point source model.
tags/r:ra: Right ascension coordinate of the center of this diaSource [deg].
tags/r:reliability: Probability (0-1) that the diaSource is astrophysical, derived from a machine learning model.
tags/r:scienceFlux: Forced photometry flux for a point source model measured on the visit image centered at DiaSource position [nJy].
tags/r:shape_flag: General source shape algorithm failure flag; set if anything went wrong when measuring the shape. Another shape flag field should also be set to provide more information.
tags/r:shape_flag_not_contained: Center not contained in footprint bounding box.
tags/r:shape_flag_parent_source: This source is a parent source; we should only be measuring on deblended children in difference imaging.
tags/r:snr: The signal-to-noise ratio at which this source was detected in the difference image.
tags/r:ssObjectId: Id of the ssObject this source was associated with, if any. If not, it is set to NULL (each diaSource will be associated with either a diaObject or ssObject).
tags/r:target_name: Scheduler target for the image containing this diaSource (RTN-097).
tags/r:templateFlux: Forced photometry flux for a point source model measured on the template image centered at the DiaObject position [nJy].
tags/r:timeProcessedMjdTai: Time when the image was processed and this DiaSource record was generated, expressed as Modified Julian Date, International Atomic Time.
tags/r:timeWithdrawnMjdTai: Time when this record was marked invalid, expressed as Modified Julian Date, International Atomic Time.
tags/r:trailAngle: Maximum likelihood fit of the angle between the meridian through the centroid and the trail direction (bearing) [deg].
tags/r:trailChi2: Chi^2 statistic of the trailed source model fit.
tags/r:trailDec: Declination coordinate of centroid for trailed source model [deg].
tags/r:trailFlux: Flux for a trailed source model. Note this actually measures the flux difference between the template and the visit image [nJy].
tags/r:trailLength: Maximum likelihood fit of trail length [arcsec].
tags/r:trailNdata: The number of data points (pixels) used to fit the trailed source model.
tags/r:trailRa: Right ascension coordinate of centroid for trailed source model [deg].
tags/r:trail_flag_edge: This flag is set if a trailed source extends onto or past edge pixels.
tags/r:visit: Id of the visit where this diaSource was measured.
tags/r:x: x position computed by a centroiding algorithm [pixel].
tags/r:y: y position computed by a centroiding algorithm [pixel].
tags/f:clf_cats_class: CATS classifier broad class prediction with the highest probability. -1= not processed, 11=SN-like, 12=Fast (e.g. KN, ulens, Novae, ...), 13=Long (e.g. SLSN, TDE, ...), 21=Periodic (e.g. RRLyrae, EB, ...), 22=Non-periodic (e.g. AGN). See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.08798
tags/f:clf_cats_score: CATS classifier highest probability (0...1). See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.08798
tags/f:clf_earlySNIa_score: Score (0...1) for the early SN Ia classifier (binary classifier). See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.08798
tags/f:clf_elephant_kstest_science: hostless indicator in the science image from the ELEPHANT pipeline. See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.18165
tags/f:clf_elephant_kstest_template: hostless indicator in the template image from the ELEPHANT pipeline. See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.18165
tags/f:clf_slsn_score: Score (0...1) for the super-luminous SN classifier (binary classifier). See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.08798
tags/f:clf_snnSnVsOthers_score: Score (0...1) for the SN classifier (binary classifier) using SuperNNova. See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.08798
tags/f:fink_broker_version: fink-broker schema version used to process the alert
tags/f:fink_science_version: fink-science schema version used to process the alert
tags/f:lsst_schema_version: LSST schema version used to generate the alert
tags/f:xm_gaiadr3_DR3Name: Unique source designation of closest source from Gaia catalog; if exists within 1 arcsec.
tags/f:xm_gaiadr3_Plx: Absolute stellar parallax (in milli-arcsecond) of the closest source from Gaia catalog; if exists within 1 arcsec.
tags/f:xm_gaiadr3_VarFlag: Photometric variability flag from Gaia DR3. 1 if the source is variable, 0 otherwise.
tags/f:xm_gaiadr3_e_Plx: Standard error of the stellar parallax (in milli-arcsecond) of the closest source from Gaia catalog; if exists within 1 arcsec.
tags/f:xm_gcvs_type: Object type of the closest source from GCVS catalog; if exists within 1 arcsec.
tags/f:xm_legacydr8_e_zphot: Uncertainty on zphot from Legacy Surveys DR8 South Photometric Redshifts catalog - standard deviation of the normally distributed photo-z posterior.
tags/f:xm_legacydr8_fqual: Photo-z reliability flag from Legacy Surveys DR8 South Photometric Redshifts catalog. =1 for sources expected to have well-constrained estimates
tags/f:xm_legacydr8_pstar: Star likelihood based on colours from GMM star-QSO classification (Legacy Surveys DR8 South Photometric Redshifts catalog)
tags/f:xm_legacydr8_zphot: Photo-z estimate from Legacy Surveys DR8 South Photometric Redshifts catalog - mean of the normally distributed photo-z posterior
tags/f:xm_mangrove_2MASS_name: 2MASS source designation of closest source from Mangrove catalog; if exists within 1 arcmin.
tags/f:xm_mangrove_HyperLEDA_name: HyperLEDA source designation of closest source from Mangrove catalog; if exists within 1 arcmin.
tags/f:xm_mangrove_ang_dist: Angular distance of closest source from Mangrove catalog; if exists within 1 arcmin.
tags/f:xm_mangrove_lum_dist: Luminosity distance of closest source from Mangrove catalog; if exists within 1 arcmin.
tags/f:xm_simbad_otype: Object type of the closest source from SIMBAD database; if exists within 1 arcsec. See https://api.lsst.fink-portal.org/api/v1/classes
tags/f:xm_spicy_SPICY: Unique source designation of closest source from SPICY catalog; if exists within 1.2 arcsec.
tags/f:xm_spicy_class: Class name of closest source from SPICY catalog; if exists within 1.2 arcsec.
tags/f:xm_tns_redshift: Redshift from TNS, if it exists.
tags/f:xm_vsx_Type: Object type of the closest source from VSX catalog; if exists within 1 arcsec.
tags/f:xm_x3hsp_type: Counterpart (cross-match) to the 3HSP catalog if exists within 1 arcminute.
tags/f:xm_x4lac_type: Counterpart (cross-match) to the 4LAC DR3 catalog if exists within 1 arcminute.
conesearch/r:apFlux: Flux in a 12 pixel radius aperture on the difference image [nJy].
conesearch/r:apFlux_flag: General aperture flux algorithm failure flag; set if anything went wrong when measuring aperture fluxes. Another apFlux flag field should also be set to provide more information.
conesearch/r:apFlux_flag_apertureTruncat: Aperture did not fit within measurement image.
conesearch/r:band: Filter band this source was observed with.

conesearch/r:dec: Declination coordinate of the position of the object [deg].
conesearch/r:detector: Id of the detector where this diaSource was measured. Datatype short instead of byte because of DB concerns about unsigned bytes.
conesearch/r:dipoleAngle: Maximum likelihood fit of the angle between the meridian through the centroid and the dipole direction (bearing, from negative to positive lobe) [deg].
conesearch/r:dipoleChi2: Chi^2 statistic of the model fit.
conesearch/r:dipoleFitAttempted: Attempted to fit a dipole model to this source.
conesearch/r:dipoleFluxDiff: Maximum likelihood value for the difference of absolute fluxes of the two lobes for a dipole model [nJy].
conesearch/r:dipoleLength: Maximum likelihood value for the lobe separation in dipole model [arcsec].
conesearch/r:dipoleMeanFlux: Maximum likelihood value for the mean absolute flux of the two lobes for a dipole model [nJy].
conesearch/r:dipoleNdata: The number of data points (pixels) used to fit the model.
conesearch/r:extendedness: A measure of extendedness, computed by comparing an object's moment-based traced radius to the PSF moments. extendedness = 1 implies a high degree of confidence that the source is extended. extendedness = 0 implies a high degree of confidence that the source is point-like.
conesearch/r:firstDiaSourceMjdTai: Time of the first diaSource, expressed as Modified Julian Date, International Atomic Time.
conesearch/r:forced_PsfFlux_flag: Forced PSF photometry on science image failed. Another forced_PsfFlux flag field should also be set to provide more information.
conesearch/r:forced_PsfFlux_flag_edge: Forced PSF flux on science image was too close to the edge of the image to use the full PSF model.
conesearch/r:forced_PsfFlux_flag_noGoodP: Forced PSF flux not enough non-rejected pixels in data to attempt the fit.
conesearch/r:g_fpFluxMean: Weighted mean forced photometry flux for g filter [nJy].
conesearch/r:g_psfFluxErrMean: Mean of the g band flux errors [nJy].
conesearch/r:g_psfFluxMaxSlope: Maximum slope between g band flux obsevations max(delta_flux/delta_time) [nJy/d].
conesearch/r:g_psfFluxMean: Weighted mean point-source model magnitude for g filter [nJy].
conesearch/r:g_psfFluxNdata: The number of g-band data points.
conesearch/r:g_psfFluxSigma: Standard deviation of the distribution of g_psfFlux [nJy].
conesearch/r:g_scienceFluxMean: Weighted mean forced photometry flux for g filter [nJy].
conesearch/r:glint_trail: This flag is set if the source is part of a glint trail.
conesearch/r:i_fpFluxMean: Weighted mean forced photometry flux for i filter [nJy].
conesearch/r:i_psfFluxErrMean: Mean of the i band flux errors [nJy].
conesearch/r:i_psfFluxMaxSlope: Maximum slope between i band flux obsevations max(delta_flux/delta_time) [nJy/d].
conesearch/r:i_psfFluxMean: Weighted mean point-source model magnitude for i filter [nJy].
conesearch/r:i_psfFluxNdata: The number of i-band data points.
conesearch/r:i_psfFluxSigma: Standard deviation of the distribution of i_psfFlux [nJy].
conesearch/r:i_scienceFluxMean: Weighted mean forced photometry flux for i filter [nJy].
conesearch/r:isDipole: Source well fit by a dipole.
conesearch/r:isNegative: Source was detected as significantly negative.
conesearch/r:ixx: Adaptive second moment of the source intensity [nJy.arcsec**2].
conesearch/r:ixxPSF: Adaptive second moment for the PSF [nJy.arcsec**2].
conesearch/r:ixy: Adaptive second moment of the source intensity [nJy.arcsec**2].

conesearch/r:iyyPSF: Adaptive second moment for the PSF [nJy.arcsec**2].

conesearch/f:clf_cats_class: CATS classifier broad class prediction with the highest probability. -1= not processed, 11=SN-like, 12=Fast (e.g. KN, ulens, Novae, ...), 13=Long (e.g. SLSN, TDE, ...), 21=Periodic (e.g. RRLyrae, EB, ...), 22=Non-periodic (e.g. AGN). See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.08798
conesearch/f:clf_cats_score: CATS classifier highest probability (0...1). See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.08798
conesearch/f:clf_earlySNIa_score: Score (0...1) for the early SN Ia classifier (binary classifier). See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.08798
conesearch/f:clf_elephant_kstest_science: hostless indicator in the science image from the ELEPHANT pipeline. See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.18165
conesearch/f:clf_elephant_kstest_templat: hostless indicator in the template image from the ELEPHANT pipeline. See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.18165
conesearch/f:clf_slsn_score: Score (0...1) for the super-luminous SN classifier (binary classifier). See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.08798
conesearch/f:clf_snnSnVsOthers_score: Score (0...1) for the SN classifier (binary classifier) using SuperNNova. See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.08798
conesearch/f:fink_broker_version: fink-broker schema version used to process the alert
conesearch/f:fink_science_version: fink-science schema version used to process the alert
conesearch/f:firstDiaSourceMjdTaiFink: MJD for the first detection by Rubin. Temporary replacement for diaObject.firstDiaSourceMjdTai which is not yet populated by the project
conesearch/f:is_cataloged: True if the last diaSource (alert) of the diaObject (object) has a counterpart in either SIMBAD or Gaia DR3. False otherwise.
conesearch/f:is_first: True if the alert is not a Solar System object and has no history (first detection at this location).
conesearch/f:is_sso: True if the diaSource is associate to a known Solar System object. False otherwise.
conesearch/f:lsst_schema_version: LSST schema version used to generate the alert
conesearch/f:main_label_classifier: Main prediction from Fink classifiers for the last received alert of this object. This is currently set to the CATS prediction only (f:clf_cats_class). Subject to change.
conesearch/f:main_label_crossmatch: Main association from various crossmatches for the last received alert of this object. This is currently set to the SIMBAD label only (f:xm_simbad_otype). Subject to change.
conesearch/f:xm_gaiadr3_DR3Name: Unique source designation of closest source from Gaia catalog; if exists within 1 arcsec.
conesearch/f:xm_gaiadr3_Plx: Absolute stellar parallax (in milli-arcsecond) of the closest source from Gaia catalog; if exists within 1 arcsec.
conesearch/f:xm_gaiadr3_VarFlag: Photometric variability flag from Gaia DR3. 1 if the source is variable, 0 otherwise.
conesearch/f:xm_gaiadr3_e_Plx: Standard error of the stellar parallax (in milli-arcsecond) of the closest source from Gaia catalog; if exists within 1 arcsec.
conesearch/f:xm_gcvs_type: Object type of the closest source from GCVS catalog; if exists within 1 arcsec.
conesearch/f:xm_legacydr8_e_zphot: Uncertainty on zphot from Legacy Surveys DR8 South Photometric Redshifts catalog - standard deviation of the normally distributed photo-z posterior.
conesearch/f:xm_legacydr8_fqual: Photo-z reliability flag from Legacy Surveys DR8 South Photometric Redshifts catalog. =1 for sources expected to have well-constrained estimates
conesearch/f:xm_legacydr8_pstar: Star likelihood based on colours from GMM star-QSO classification (Legacy Surveys DR8 South Photometric Redshifts catalog)
conesearch/f:xm_legacydr8_zphot: Photo-z estimate from Legacy Surveys DR8 South Photometric Redshifts catalog - mean of the normally distributed photo-z posterior
conesearch/f:xm_mangrove_2MASS_name: 2MASS source designation of closest source from Mangrove catalog; if exists within 1 arcmin.
conesearch/f:xm_mangrove_HyperLEDA_name: HyperLEDA source designation of closest source from Mangrove catalog; if exists within 1 arcmin.
conesearch/f:xm_mangrove_ang_dist: Angular distance of closest source from Mangrove catalog; if exists within 1 arcmin.
conesearch/f:xm_mangrove_lum_dist: Luminosity distance of closest source from Mangrove catalog; if exists within 1 arcmin.
conesearch/f:xm_simbad_otype: Object type of the closest source from SIMBAD database; if exists within 1 arcsec. See https://api.lsst.fink-portal.org/api/v1/classes
conesearch/f:xm_spicy_SPICY: Unique source designation of closest source from SPICY catalog; if exists within 1.2 arcsec.
conesearch/f:xm_spicy_class: Class name of closest source from SPICY catalog; if exists within 1.2 arcsec.
conesearch/f:xm_tns_redshift: Redshift from TNS, if it exists.
conesearch/f:xm_vsx_Type: Object type of the closest source from VSX catalog; if exists within 1 arcsec.
conesearch/f:xm_x3hsp_type: Counterpart (cross-match) to the 3HSP catalog if exists within 1 arcminute.
conesearch/f:xm_x4lac_type: Counterpart (cross-match) to the 4LAC DR3 catalog if exists within 1 arcminute.
objects/r:dec: Declination coordinate of the position of the object [deg].
objects/r:firstDiaSourceMjdTai: Time of the first diaSource, expressed as Modified Julian Date, International Atomic Time.
objects/r:g_fpFluxMean: Weighted mean forced photometry flux for g filter [nJy].
objects/r:g_psfFluxErrMean: Mean of the g band flux errors [nJy].
objects/r:g_psfFluxMaxSlope: Maximum slope between g band flux obsevations max(delta_flux/delta_time) [nJy/d].
objects/r:g_psfFluxMean: Weighted mean point-source model magnitude for g filter [nJy].
objects/r:g_psfFluxNdata: The number of g-band data points.
objects/r:g_psfFluxSigma: Standard deviation of the distribution of g_psfFlux [nJy].
objects/r:g_scienceFluxMean: Weighted mean forced photometry flux for g filter [nJy].
objects/r:i_fpFluxMean: Weighted mean forced photometry flux for i filter [nJy].
objects/r:i_psfFluxErrMean: Mean of the i band flux errors [nJy].
objects/r:i_psfFluxMaxSlope: Maximum slope between i band flux obsevations max(delta_flux/delta_time) [nJy/d].
objects/r:i_psfFluxMean: Weighted mean point-source model magnitude for i filter [nJy].
objects/r:i_psfFluxNdata: The number of i-band data points.
objects/r:i_psfFluxSigma: Standard deviation of the distribution of i_psfFlux [nJy].
objects/r:i_scienceFluxMean: Weighted mean forced photometry flux for i filter [nJy].
objects/r:lastDiaSourceMjdTai: Time of the most recent non-forced DIASource for this object, expressed as Modified Julian Date, International Atomic Time.
objects/r:nDiaSources: Total number of DiaSources associated with this DiaObject.
objects/r:observation_reason: Scheduler reason for the image containing this diaSource (RTN-097).
objects/r:r_fpFluxMean: Weighted mean forced photometry flux for r filter [nJy].
objects/r:r_psfFluxErrMean: Mean of the r band flux errors [nJy].
objects/r:r_psfFluxMaxSlope: Maximum slope between r band flux obsevations max(delta_flux/delta_time) [nJy/d].
objects/r:r_psfFluxMean: Weighted mean point-source model magnitude for r filter [nJy].
objects/r:r_psfFluxNdata: The number of r-band data points.
objects/r:r_psfFluxSigma: Standard deviation of the distribution of r_psfFlux [nJy].
objects/r:r_scienceFluxMean: Weighted mean forced photometry flux for r filter [nJy].
objects/r:ra: Right ascension coordinate of the position of the object [deg].
objects/r:target_name: Scheduler target for the image containing this diaSource (RTN-097).
objects/r:u_fpFluxMean: Weighted mean forced photometry flux for u filter [nJy].
objects/r:u_psfFluxErrMean: Mean of the u band flux errors [nJy].
objects/r:u_psfFluxMaxSlope: Maximum slope between u band flux obsevations max(delta_flux/delta_time) [nJy/d].
objects/r:u_psfFluxMean: Weighted mean point-source model magnitude for u filter [nJy].
objects/r:u_psfFluxNdata: The number of u-band data points.
objects/r:u_psfFluxSigma: Standard deviation of the distribution of u_psfFlux [nJy].
objects/r:u_scienceFluxMean: Weighted mean forced photometry flux for u filter [nJy].
objects/r:validityStartMjdTai: Processing time when validity of this diaObject starts, expressed as Modified Julian Date, International Atomic Time.
objects/r:y_fpFluxMean: Weighted mean forced photometry flux for y filter [nJy].
objects/r:y_psfFluxErrMean: Mean of the y band flux errors [nJy].
objects/r:y_psfFluxMaxSlope: Maximum slope between y band flux obsevations max(delta_flux/delta_time) [nJy/d].
objects/r:y_psfFluxMean: Weighted mean point-source model magnitude for y filter [nJy].
objects/r:y_psfFluxNdata: The number of y-band data points.
objects/r:y_psfFluxSigma: Standard deviation of the distribution of y_psfFlux [nJy].
objects/r:y_scienceFluxMean: Weighted mean forced photometry flux for y filter [nJy].
objects/r:z_fpFluxMean: Weighted mean forced photometry flux for z filter [nJy].
objects/r:z_psfFluxErrMean: Mean of the z band flux errors [nJy].
objects/r:z_psfFluxMaxSlope: Maximum slope between z band flux obsevations max(delta_flux/delta_time) [nJy/d].
objects/r:z_psfFluxMean: Weighted mean point-source model magnitude for z filter [nJy].
objects/r:z_psfFluxNdata: The number of z-band data points.
objects/r:z_psfFluxSigma: Standard deviation of the distribution of z_psfFlux [nJy].
objects/r:z_scienceFluxMean: Weighted mean forced photometry flux for z filter [nJy].
objects/f:firstDiaSourceMjdTaiFink: MJD for the first detection by Rubin. Temporary replacement for diaObject.firstDiaSourceMjdTai which is not yet populated by the project
objects/f:is_cataloged: True if the last diaSource (alert) of the diaObject (object) has a counterpart in either SIMBAD or Gaia DR3. False otherwise.
objects/f:is_first: True if the alert is not a Solar System object and has no history (first detection at this location).
objects/f:is_sso: True if the diaSource is associate to a known Solar System object. False otherwise.
objects/f:main_label_classifier: Main prediction from Fink classifiers for the last received alert of this object. This is currently set to the CATS prediction only (f:clf_cats_class). Subject to change.
objects/f:main_label_crossmatch: Main association from various crossmatches for the last received alert of this object. This is currently set to the SIMBAD label only (f:xm_simbad_otype). Subject to change.
sources/r:apFlux: Flux in a 12 pixel radius aperture on the difference image [nJy].
sources/r:apFlux_flag: General aperture flux algorithm failure flag; set if anything went wrong when measuring aperture fluxes. Another apFlux flag field should also be set to provide more information.
sources/r:apFlux_flag_apertureTruncated: Aperture did not fit within measurement image.
sources/r:band: Filter band this source was observed with.
sources/r:bboxSize: Size of the square bounding box that fully contains the detection footprint [pixel].
sources/r:centroid_flag: General centroid algorithm failure flag; set if anything went wrong when fitting the centroid. Another centroid flag field should also be set to provide more information.
sources/r:dec: Declination coordinate of the center of this diaSource [deg].
sources/r:detector: Id of the detector where this diaSource was measured. Datatype short instead of byte because of DB concerns about unsigned bytes.
sources/r:diaObjectId: Id of the diaObject this source was associated with, if any. If not, it is set to NULL (each diaSource will be associated with either a diaObject or ssObject).
sources/r:dipoleAngle: Maximum likelihood fit of the angle between the meridian through the centroid and the dipole direction (bearing, from negative to positive lobe) [deg].
sources/r:dipoleChi2: Chi^2 statistic of the model fit.
sources/r:dipoleFitAttempted: Attempted to fit a dipole model to this source.
sources/r:dipoleFluxDiff: Maximum likelihood value for the difference of absolute fluxes of the two lobes for a dipole model [nJy].
sources/r:dipoleLength: Maximum likelihood value for the lobe separation in dipole model [arcsec].
sources/r:dipoleMeanFlux: Maximum likelihood value for the mean absolute flux of the two lobes for a dipole model [nJy].
sources/r:dipoleNdata: The number of data points (pixels) used to fit the model.
sources/r:extendedness: A measure of extendedness, computed by comparing an object's moment-based traced radius to the PSF moments. extendedness = 1 implies a high degree of confidence that the source is extended. extendedness = 0 implies a high degree of confidence that the source is point-like.
sources/r:forced_PsfFlux_flag: Forced PSF photometry on science image failed. Another forced_PsfFlux flag field should also be set to provide more information.
sources/r:forced_PsfFlux_flag_edge: Forced PSF flux on science image was too close to the edge of the image to use the full PSF model.
sources/r:forced_PsfFlux_flag_noGoodPixe: Forced PSF flux not enough non-rejected pixels in data to attempt the fit.
sources/r:glint_trail: This flag is set if the source is part of a glint trail.
sources/r:isDipole: Source well fit by a dipole.
sources/r:isNegative: Source was detected as significantly negative.
sources/r:ixx: Adaptive second moment of the source intensity [nJy.arcsec**2].
sources/r:ixxPSF: Adaptive second moment for the PSF [nJy.arcsec**2].
sources/r:ixy: Adaptive second moment of the source intensity [nJy.arcsec**2].
sources/r:ixyPSF: Adaptive second moment for the PSF [nJy.arcsec**2].
sources/r:iyy: Adaptive second moment of the source intensity [nJy.arcsec**2].
sources/r:iyyPSF: Adaptive second moment for the PSF [nJy.arcsec**2].
sources/r:midpointMjdTai: Effective mid-visit time for this diaSource, expressed as Modified Julian Date, International Atomic Time [d].
sources/r:observation_reason: Scheduler reason for the image containing this diaSource (RTN-097).
sources/r:parentDiaSourceId: Id of the parent diaSource this diaSource has been deblended from, if any.
sources/r:pixelFlags: General pixel flags failure; set if anything went wrong when setting pixels flags from this footprint's mask. This implies that some pixelFlags for this source may be incorrectly set to False.
sources/r:pixelFlags_bad: Bad pixel in the DiaSource footprint.
sources/r:pixelFlags_cr: Cosmic ray in the DiaSource footprint.
sources/r:pixelFlags_crCenter: Cosmic ray in the 3x3 region around the centroid.
sources/r:pixelFlags_edge: Some of the source footprint is outside usable exposure region (masked EDGE or centroid off image).
sources/r:pixelFlags_injectedCenter: Injection in the 3x3 region around the centroid.
sources/r:pixelFlags_injected_template: Template injection in the DiaSource footprint.
sources/r:pixelFlags_injected_templateCe: Template injection in the 3x3 region around the centroid.
sources/r:pixelFlags_interpolated: Interpolated pixel in the DiaSource footprint.
sources/r:pixelFlags_interpolatedCenter: Interpolated pixel in the 3x3 region around the centroid.
sources/r:pixelFlags_nodata: NO_DATA pixel in the source footprint.
sources/r:pixelFlags_nodataCenter: NO_DATA pixel in the 3x3 region around the centroid.
sources/r:pixelFlags_saturated: Saturated pixel in the DiaSource footprint.
sources/r:pixelFlags_saturatedCenter: Saturated pixel in the 3x3 region around the centroid.
sources/r:pixelFlags_streakCenter: Streak in the 3x3 region around the centroid.
sources/r:pixelFlags_suspectCenter: Suspect pixel in the 3x3 region around the centroid.
sources/r:psfChi2: Chi^2 statistic of the point source model fit.
sources/r:psfFlux: Flux for Point Source model. Note this actually measures the flux difference between the template and the visit image [nJy].
sources/r:psfFlux_flag: Failure to derive linear least-squares fit of psf model. Another psfFlux flag field should also be set to provide more information.
sources/r:psfFlux_flag_edge: Object was too close to the edge of the image to use the full PSF model.
sources/r:psfFlux_flag_noGoodPixels: Not enough non-rejected pixels in data to attempt the fit.
sources/r:psfLnL: Natural log likelihood of the observed data given the point source model.
sources/r:psfNdata: The number of data points (pixels) used to fit the point source model.
sources/r:ra: Right ascension coordinate of the center of this diaSource [deg].
sources/r:reliability: Probability (0-1) that the diaSource is astrophysical, derived from a machine learning model.
sources/r:scienceFlux: Forced photometry flux for a point source model measured on the visit image centered at DiaSource position [nJy].
sources/r:shape_flag: General source shape algorithm failure flag; set if anything went wrong when measuring the shape. Another shape flag field should also be set to provide more information.
sources/r:shape_flag_not_contained: Center not contained in footprint bounding box.
sources/r:shape_flag_parent_source: This source is a parent source; we should only be measuring on deblended children in difference imaging.
sources/r:snr: The signal-to-noise ratio at which this source was detected in the difference image.
sources/r:ssObjectId: Id of the ssObject this source was associated with, if any. If not, it is set to NULL (each diaSource will be associated with either a diaObject or ssObject).
sources/r:target_name: Scheduler target for the image containing this diaSource (RTN-097).
sources/r:templateFlux: Forced photometry flux for a point source model measured on the template image centered at the DiaObject position [nJy].
sources/r:timeProcessedMjdTai: Time when the image was processed and this DiaSource record was generated, expressed as Modified Julian Date, International Atomic Time.
sources/r:timeWithdrawnMjdTai: Time when this record was marked invalid, expressed as Modified Julian Date, International Atomic Time.
sources/r:trailAngle: Maximum likelihood fit of the angle between the meridian through the centroid and the trail direction (bearing) [deg].
sources/r:trailChi2: Chi^2 statistic of the trailed source model fit.
sources/r:trailDec: Declination coordinate of centroid for trailed source model [deg].
sources/r:trailFlux: Flux for a trailed source model. Note this actually measures the flux difference between the template and the visit image [nJy].
sources/r:trailLength: Maximum likelihood fit of trail length [arcsec].
sources/r:trailNdata: The number of data points (pixels) used to fit the trailed source model.
sources/r:trailRa: Right ascension coordinate of centroid for trailed source model [deg].
sources/r:trail_flag_edge: This flag is set if a trailed source extends onto or past edge pixels.
sources/r:visit: Id of the visit where this diaSource was measured.
sources/r:x: x position computed by a centroiding algorithm [pixel].
sources/r:y: y position computed by a centroiding algorithm [pixel].
sources/f:clf_cats_class: CATS classifier broad class prediction with the highest probability. -1= not processed, 11=SN-like, 12=Fast (e.g. KN, ulens, Novae, ...), 13=Long (e.g. SLSN, TDE, ...), 21=Periodic (e.g. RRLyrae, EB, ...), 22=Non-periodic (e.g. AGN). See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.08798
sources/f:clf_cats_score: CATS classifier highest probability (0...1). See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.08798
sources/f:clf_earlySNIa_score: Score (0...1) for the early SN Ia classifier (binary classifier). See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.08798
sources/f:clf_elephant_kstest_science: hostless indicator in the science image from the ELEPHANT pipeline. See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.18165
sources/f:clf_elephant_kstest_template: hostless indicator in the template image from the ELEPHANT pipeline. See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.18165
sources/f:clf_slsn_score: Score (0...1) for the super-luminous SN classifier (binary classifier). See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.08798
sources/f:clf_snnSnVsOthers_score: Score (0...1) for the SN classifier (binary classifier) using SuperNNova. See https://arxiv.org/abs/2404.08798
sources/f:fink_broker_version: fink-broker schema version used to process the alert
sources/f:fink_science_version: fink-science schema version used to process the alert
sources/f:lsst_schema_version: LSST schema version used to generate the alert
sources/f:xm_gaiadr3_DR3Name: Unique source designation of closest source from Gaia catalog; if exists within 1 arcsec.
sources/f:xm_gaiadr3_Plx: Absolute stellar parallax (in milli-arcsecond) of the closest source from Gaia catalog; if exists within 1 arcsec.
sources/f:xm_gaiadr3_VarFlag: Photometric variability flag from Gaia DR3. 1 if the source is variable, 0 otherwise.
sources/f:xm_gaiadr3_e_Plx: Standard error of the stellar parallax (in milli-arcsecond) of the closest source from Gaia catalog; if exists within 1 arcsec.
sources/f:xm_gcvs_type: Object type of the closest source from GCVS catalog; if exists within 1 arcsec.
sources/f:xm_legacydr8_e_zphot: Uncertainty on zphot from Legacy Surveys DR8 South Photometric Redshifts catalog - standard deviation of the normally distributed photo-z posterior.
sources/f:xm_legacydr8_fqual: Photo-z reliability flag from Legacy Surveys DR8 South Photometric Redshifts catalog. =1 for sources expected to have well-constrained estimates
sources/f:xm_legacydr8_pstar: Star likelihood based on colours from GMM star-QSO classification (Legacy Surveys DR8 South Photometric Redshifts catalog)
sources/f:xm_legacydr8_zphot: Photo-z estimate from Legacy Surveys DR8 South Photometric Redshifts catalog - mean of the normally distributed photo-z posterior
sources/f:xm_mangrove_2MASS_name: 2MASS source designation of closest source from Mangrove catalog; if exists within 1 arcmin.
sources/f:xm_mangrove_HyperLEDA_name: HyperLEDA source designation of closest source from Mangrove catalog; if exists within 1 arcmin.
sources/f:xm_mangrove_ang_dist: Angular distance of closest source from Mangrove catalog; if exists within 1 arcmin.
sources/f:xm_mangrove_lum_dist: Luminosity distance of closest source from Mangrove catalog; if exists within 1 arcmin.
sources/f:xm_simbad_otype: Object type of the closest source from SIMBAD database; if exists within 1 arcsec. See https://api.lsst.fink-portal.org/api/v1/classes
sources/f:xm_spicy_SPICY: Unique source designation of closest source from SPICY catalog; if exists within 1.2 arcsec.
sources/f:xm_spicy_class: Class name of closest source from SPICY catalog; if exists within 1.2 arcsec.
sources/f:xm_tns_redshift: Redshift from TNS, if it exists.
sources/f:xm_vsx_Type: Object type of the closest source from VSX catalog; if exists within 1 arcsec.
sources/f:xm_x3hsp_type: Counterpart (cross-match) to the 3HSP catalog if exists within 1 arcminute.
sources/f:xm_x4lac_type: Counterpart (cross-match) to the 4LAC DR3 catalog if exists within 1 arcminute.
fp/r:band: Filter band this source was observed with.
fp/r:dec: Declination coordinate of the position of the DiaObject [deg].
fp/r:detector: Id of the detector where this forcedSource was measured. Datatype short instead of byte because of DB concerns about unsigned bytes.
fp/r:diaObjectId: Id of the DiaObject that this DiaForcedSource was associated with.
fp/r:midpointMjdTai: Effective mid-visit time for this diaForcedSource, expressed as Modified Julian Date, International Atomic Time [d].
fp/r:ra: Right ascension coordinate of the position of the DiaObject [deg].
fp/r:scienceFlux: Forced photometry flux for a point source model measured on the visit image centered at the DiaObject position [nJy].
fp/r:timeProcessedMjdTai: Time when this record was generated, expressed as Modified Julian Date, International Atomic Time.
fp/r:timeWithdrawnMjdTai: Time when this record was marked invalid, expressed as Modified Julian Date, International Atomic Time.
fp/r:visit: Id of the visit where this forcedSource was measured.
